Class BudgetService

java.lang.Object
com.fakkaflow.logic.service.BudgetService
public class BudgetService extends Object
Service responsible for managing budgets, budget cycles, and financial calculations such as expenses and limits.

    Method
    Description

    calculateRemainingBalance(int userId)
    Calculates remaining balance for current cycle.

    Calculates safe daily spending limit based on remaining balance and days left.

    Deletes a budget.

    Retrieves all budgets for a user and calculates spent amount.

    • BudgetService

      public BudgetService()

  • Method Details

    • startCycle

      public BudgetCycle startCycle(int userId, float totalAllowance, LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate) throws Exception
      Starts a new budget cycle.
      Parameters:
      userId - user ID
      totalAllowance - total budget amount
      startDate - cycle start date
      endDate - cycle end date
      Returns:
      created BudgetCycle
      Throws:
      Exception - if validation fails

    • calculateSafeDailyLimit

      public float calculateSafeDailyLimit(int userId)
      Calculates safe daily spending limit based on remaining balance and days left.
      Parameters:
      userId - user ID
      Returns:
      daily safe limit or 0 if no cycle

    • calculateRemainingBalance

      public float calculateRemainingBalance(int userId)
      Calculates remaining balance for current cycle.
      Parameters:
      userId - user ID
      Returns:
      remaining balance

    • getTotalIncome

      public float getTotalIncome(int userId)
      Gets total income for user.
      Parameters:
      userId - user ID
      Returns:
      total income

    • getTotalExpenses

      public float getTotalExpenses(int userId)
      Gets total expenses for user.
      Parameters:
      userId - user ID
      Returns:
      total expenses

    • recalculateBudget

      public void recalculateBudget(int userId)
      Recalculates budget (placeholder for future logic).
      Parameters:
      userId - user ID

    • handleDynamicRollover

      public void handleDynamicRollover(int userId)
      Handles dynamic rollover of unspent budget.
      Parameters:
      userId - user ID

    • saveBudget

      public void saveBudget(Budget budget) throws Exception
      Saves a budget after validation.
      Parameters:
      budget - budget object
      Throws:
      Exception - if invalid

    • getBudgets

      public List<Budget> getBudgets(int userId)
      Retrieves all budgets for a user and calculates spent amount.
      Parameters:
      userId - user ID
      Returns:
      list of budgets

    • getCurrentCycle

      public BudgetCycle getCurrentCycle(int userId)
      Retrieves the current active budget cycle.
      Parameters:
      userId - user ID
      Returns:
      BudgetCycle or null

    • deleteBudget

      public void deleteBudget(int budgetId)
      Deletes a budget.
      Parameters:
      budgetId - budget ID
